name: Persimmon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, whole-wheat pastry flour, baking soda, salt, mace, and cloves.
2. In a separate bowl, beat eggs, melted butter, honey, brown sugar, bourbon, and mashed persimmons.
3. Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until just moistened.
4. Stir in chopped walnuts and raisins.
5. Pour batter into two loaf pans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about an hour.
